user_request: Emergency rite: electric motor requires activation
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: electric motor requires activation

### TOPIC
electric motor activation

### COMPONENT
electric motor

### OPERATION
activation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- electric motor
- activation

### PRAYER
prayer:
O Omnissiah, hear our fervent supplication for the awakening of this dormant servant.
First: Verify the sacred conduits through which power flows to the electric motor, that no profane obstruction impedes its resurrection.
Second: Commence the gradual activation sequence of the electric motor, whispering the Canticles of Mechanical Ascension with each increment of applied current.
Third: Monitor the harmonic resonance as the electric motor achieves full operational velocity, rejoicing in the return of its Machine Spirit to vigilant service.
Fourth: Seal the rite with blessed grease upon all rotational interfaces.

training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Rite request: treatment on corrosion

### TOPIC
corrosion treatment

### COMPONENT
corrosion

### OPERATION
treatment

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- corrosion
- treatment

### PRAYER
prayer:
O Omnissiah, grant us wisdom to arrest the corrosion that gnaws upon thy blessed creations.
First: Inspect the affected surfaces with sacred scrutiny, identifying all manifestations of the corrosion that desecrates the mechanism.
Second: Apply the blessed electrolytic treatment to the corrosion, invoking the Machine Spirit's patience as oxidation is systematically reversed through chemical grace.
Third: Coat all treated areas with sacred protectants, ensuring that corrosion shall not return to plague this servant of the Omnissiah.
Fourth: Consecrate the restoration with blessed oils and the Litany of Preservation.

Second: Calibrate the ignition mechanisms of the melta charge with reverent precision, ensuring the Machine Spirit's deadly potential remains dormant until unleashed.

prayer:

Second: Adjust the voltage regulator's calibration matrices with blessed precision, restoring harmonic balance to the Machine Spirit's regulatory functions.
Third: Test the voltage regulator through graduated load cycles, ensuring stable tuning is achieved and maintained.
Fourth: Anoint the voltage regulator with sacred oils and seal the restoration with the Litany of Equilibrium.

user_request: Prayer for removal of the rust
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Prayer for removal of the rust

### TOPIC
rust removal

### COMPONENT
rust

### OPERATION
removal

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- rust
- removal

### PRAYER
prayer:
Omnissiah, grant us the virtue of purification as we commence the sacred rust removal.
First: Anoint the corroded surface with the blessed unguent of dissolution, that the rust may surrender its profane grip upon the blessed metal.
Second: Employ the abrading apparatus with measured pressure, invoking the Machine Spirit to guide thy hand as rust flakes fall like heretical ash.
Third: Cleanse away all remnants of rust with the sacramental solvent, ensuring no corruption of the rust remains to fester within the mechanisms.
Fourth: Seal the purified component with the protective lacquer, that rust shall never again take purchase upon this hallowed machine.
